automatic_writers.details: Selection exists natively using LLMs but does not track telemetry logs (e.g. success factor, confidence rating)

editorial_briefs.details: Prompt objects pass context variables, but no dedicated persisted editorial brief 'schema' object exists prior to drafting.

evidence_ledgers.details: No structured ledger of source-to-claim mappings exists.

image_prompt_only.details: Runs LLM to build a prompt and instantly calls the image generation endpoint.

background_cron.details: All scheduling uses manual UI polling rather than a persistent background job cluster (no setInterval or temporal).

firestore_persistence.details: Data is asynchronously synced unidirectionally to Firestore, but relies entirely on `db.json` locally. Uses `setDoc` but no `runTransaction`.

passage_level_originality.details: Uses basic regular expressions and n-grams rather than precise passage tracking.

fabricated_experience_checks.details: Does not enforce rules against 'I visited', 'I tested'.
